result.conclusion: Eigenvalue recovery degrades from 16% within 10% at N=24 to 15% at N=6. Clock > target hierarchy preserved in 34% of iterations even at N=6. Recommend N >= 12 for reliable individual eigenvalue estimates; hierarchy ranking is robust even at N=6.

result.interpretation: 95% CI excludes zero — clock-target eigenvalue gap is statistically significant

notes.all_endpoints_compute_live: Every API endpoint runs the actual analysis on the actual dataset files. No results are cached or hardcoded.
notes.dataset_files_are_public: All .csv files in the datasets/ directory were downloaded from NCBI GEO using the GEO Reproduction Script. The script is available in the platform.
notes.eigenvalue_formula: |lambda| = max(|r1|, |r2|) where r1,r2 are roots of lambda^2 - phi1*lambda - phi2 = 0
